caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark gray background. She is wearing a light green tunic with floral embroidery and a dark decorative border around the neckline, a thin necklace, and a silver bracelet on her left wrist. As she speaks, she gestures with her hands, raising her left hand and moving her right hand slightly. A small logo featuring a circular symbol and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a centered medium shot, maintaining her position while her facial expressions and hand gestures shift slightly to accompany her speech. The lighting is consistent across the frames, focusing on the woman while the background remains dark and featureless.
